label: To make a promise | 동 | verb

glosses.ja: 約束する; 取り決める

translations.en: I told mom that I promised.
translations.es: Le dije a mamá que lo había prometido.
translations.fr: J'ai dit à maman que j'avais promis.
translations.de: Ich habe Mama gesagt, dass ich es versprochen habe.
translations.it: Ho detto a mamma che avevo promesso.
translations.yue: 我同媽媽講咗我已經答應咗。
translations.pt: Eu disse à mamãe que prometi.
translations.vi: Tôi đã nói với mẹ rằng tôi đã hứa.
translations.nl: Ik heb tegen mama gezegd dat ik het beloofd had.
translations.hi: मैंने मम्मी से कहा कि मैंने वादा किया था.
translations.el: Είπα στη μαμά ότι το είχα υποσχεθεί.
translations.nb: Jeg fortalte mamma at jeg hadde lovet.
translations.id: Saya mengatakan kepada ibu bahwa saya berjanji.
translations.sv: Jag sa till mamma att jag hade lovat.
translations.ro: I-am spus mamei că am promis.
translations.cs: Řekl jsem mámě, že jsem slíbil.
translations.da: Jeg fortalte mor, at jeg havde lovet.
translations.ja: 私は母に約束したと言いました。

tokens.explanation: Dative particle '-한테' attached to '엄마' indicating the indirect object 'to mom'.
Nominative particle '-가' attached to pronoun '저' marking the subject 'I'.
Quotative suffix '-다고' attached to the verb stem '약속하다' to mark a quoted clause 'that (I) promise'.
Past polite form of '말하다' meaning 'said'.

translations.en: The teacher asked me if I promised.
translations.es: El profesor me preguntó si había prometido.
translations.fr: Le professeur m'a demandé si j'avais promis.
translations.de: Der Lehrer fragte mich, ob ich versprochen hatte.
translations.it: L’insegnante mi ha chiesto se avevo promesso.
translations.ru: Учитель спросил меня, обещал ли я.
translations.pt: O professor me perguntou se eu tinha prometido.
translations.tr: Öğretmen bana söz verip vermediğimi sordu.
translations.vi: Giáo viên hỏi tôi có hứa không.
translations.ar: سألني المعلم إذا كنت قد وعدت.
translations.nl: De leraar vroeg me of ik had beloofd.
translations.uk: Учитель запитав мене, чи я обіцяв.
translations.hu: A tanár megkérdezte tőlem, hogy ígértem-e.
translations.hi: शिक्षक ने मुझसे पूछा कि क्या मैंने वादा किया था.
translations.el: Ο δάσκαλος με ρώτησε αν είχα υποσχεθεί.
translations.nb: Læreren spurte meg om jeg hadde lovet.
translations.id: Guru bertanya kepada saya apakah saya sudah berjanji.
translations.sv: Läraren frågade mig om jag hade lovat.
translations.ro: Profesorul m-a întrebat dacă am promis.
translations.cs: Učitel se mě zeptal, jestli jsem slíbil.
translations.da: Læreren spurgte mig, om jeg havde lovet.
translations.ja: 先生は私に約束したかどうかを尋ねた。

tokens.explanation: Nominative particle '-이' attached to '선생님' marking the subject 'teacher'.
Dative particle '-에게' attached to pronoun '저' indicating the indirect object 'to me'.
Quotative suffix '-다고' attached to the verb stem '약속하다' to mark a quoted clause 'that (I) promise'.
Honorific infix '-시-' plus past polite ending '-었어요' on '물어보다' meaning 'asked (honorifically)'.

translations.en: We promise to meet at the park tomorrow.
translations.es: Prometemos encontrarnos en el parque mañana.
translations.fr: Nous promettons de nous retrouver au parc demain.
translations.de: Wir versprechen, uns morgen im Park zu treffen.
translations.it: Promettiamo di incontrarci al parco domani.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们答应明天在公园见面。
translations.yue: 我哋答應聽日喺公園見面。
translations.ru: Мы обещаем встретиться в парке завтра.
translations.pt: Prometemos nos encontrar no parque amanhã.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi hứa sẽ gặp nhau ở công viên ngày mai.
translations.ar: نعد أن نلتقي في الحديقة غدًا.
translations.nl: We beloven elkaar morgen in het park te ontmoeten.
translations.uk: Ми обіцяємо зустрітися завтра в парку.
translations.hu: Megígérjük, hogy holnap a parkban találkozunk.
translations.hi: हम वादा करते हैं कि हम कल पार्क में मिलेंगे.
translations.pl: Obiecujemy spotkać się jutro w parku.
translations.el: Υποσχόμαστε να συναντηθούμε αύριο στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Vi lover å møtes i parken i morgen.
translations.id: Kami berjanji akan bertemu di taman besok.
translations.sv: Vi lovar att träffas i parken imorgon.
translations.ro: Promitem să ne întâlnim mâine în parc.
translations.cs: Slibujeme, že se zítra setkáme v parku.
translations.da: Vi lover at mødes i parken i morgen.
translations.ja: 私たちは明日公園で会うと約束します。

tokens.explanation: Topic particle '-는' attached to '우리' marking 'we' as the topic.
Temporal noun meaning 'tomorrow'.
Locative particle '-에서' attached to '공원' marking the place 'at the park'.
Suffix '-기로' attached to '만나다' to indicate a decision or agreement 'to meet'.
Present polite form of '약속하다' meaning 'promise'.

translations.en: Dad promises to come home early.
translations.es: Papá promete llegar a casa temprano.
translations.de: Papa verspricht, früh nach Hause zu kommen.
translations.it: Papà promette di tornare presto a casa.
translations.yue: 爸爸答應會早啲返屋企。
translations.pt: Papai promete chegar em casa cedo.
translations.tr: Babam erken eve geleceğine söz veriyor.
translations.vi: Bố hứa sẽ về nhà sớm.
translations.ar: يعد والدي بالعودة إلى المنزل مبكرًا.
translations.nl: Papa belooft vroeg thuis te komen.
translations.hi: पापा वादा करते हैं कि वह जल्दी घर लौटेंगे.
translations.pl: Tata obiecuje, że wróci do domu wcześnie.
translations.el: Ο μπαμπάς υπόσχεται να έρθει νωρίς στο σπίτι.
translations.nb: Pappa lover å komme hjem tidlig.
translations.sv: Pappa lovar att komma hem tidigt.
translations.ro: Tatăl promite să vină acasă devreme.
translations.cs: Táta slibuje, že přijde domů brzy.
translations.da: Far lover at komme hjem tidligt.
translations.ja: お父さんは早く帰宅すると約束します。

tokens.explanation: Topic particle '-는' attached to '아빠' marking 'dad' as the topic.
Adverb meaning 'early'.
Future-intentional suffix '-겠' plus quotative '-다고' attached to '들어오다', meaning 'that (I/he) will come in'.
Present polite form of '약속하다' meaning 'promise'.
